name: lock-release removes the lockfile entry for the specified section
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && printf 'owner=pid-1234\nacquired_at=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-release.sh" --section rule_cache --owner pid-1234 --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks 2>err.txt && [ ! -f .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock ] && echo ok 1>&2
